heading: Organization
label: 130301 Organization
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)130301(a)36:631 (related to creation and declaration of incorporation).36:632., §§ 1, 2, 4(1), , 487.Aug. 4, 1955, ch. 54669 Stat. 486130301(b)36:631 (related to place of incorporation and domicile).130301(c)36:631 (related to perpetual succession).36:634(1).130301(d)36:648., , .June 21, 1961Pub. L. 87–56, § 175 Stat. 95This section is substituted for the source provisions for consistency in the revised title and to eliminate executed and unnecessary words.In subsection (a), the text of 36:632 is omitted as executed and obsolete.In subsection (d), the words “The corporation known as the Army and Navy Legion of Valor of the United States of America, Incorporated, which was incorporated by the Act entitled ‘An Act to Incorporate the Army and Navy Legion of Valor of the United States of America’, approved (), shall be known and designated on and after as the Legion of Valor of the United States of America, Incorporated, and” are omitted as executed. The words “such corporation under the name of” and “such corporation under and by the name of” are omitted as unnecessary. The words “is deemed” are substituted for “shall be held” for consistency in the revised title.August 4, 1955June 21, 196169 Stat. 486

children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: Legion of Valor of the United States of America, Incorporated (in this chapter, the “corporation”), is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Place of Incorporation and Domicile
children.label: b .—Place of Incorporation and Domicile
children.text: The corporation is declared to be incorporated and domiciled in the District of Columbia.

children.heading: .—Perpetual Existence
children.label: c .—Perpetual Existence
children.text: Except as otherwise provided, the corporation has perpetual existence.

children.heading: .—References to Army and Navy Legion of Valor of the United States of America, Incorporated
children.label: d .—References to Army and Navy Legion of Valor of the United States of America, Incorporated
children.text: Any reference to the Army and Navy Legion of Valor of the United States of America, Incorporated, is deemed to refer to the Legion of Valor of the United States of America, Incorporated.
